etymology.description: semantic 生(生) (shēng, "life") + phonetic 辛(辛) (xīn) -> meaning
etymology.interpretation: The character 甡 contains the semantic component 生(生) (shēng, "life") which may suggest something related to production or generation, combined with the phonetic 辛(辛) (xīn), which contributes the sound. The character's connection to 'broom' is through borrowing for phonetic purposes and does not derive directly from its parts.
